title: APIs & Workflows: How AI Apps Are Built
summary: Thousands of AI products rely on only a handful of model builders. The key is APIs, and many real AI products are fixed workflows with a model inside one or two steps.

context.headline: An assembly line with a model inside
context.description: Much business AI is not an agent - it is a fixed pipeline where an LLM handles one or two steps, such as extracting invoice details from an email. Understanding the workflow pattern, and the APIs that make it possible, explains where much real-world AI value is created today.
context.when: How real products use AI in production
